title: Tower T900112 Precision 20cm Non-Stick Forged Aluminium Frying Pan with Black Diamond Coating, Soft Grip Handle, Black
features: 20CM PRECISION PAN: Fry up your favourite foods with consistently quality results with each use
BLACK DIAMOND COATING: Stone-reinforced coating is 7 times stronger than standard non-stick coating, requiring little or no oil for healthier cooking
THICK FORGED ALUMINIUM: Features a 3mm aluminium body which provides faster heat distribution for a more efficient cook
NANO-CRATE TECHNOLOGY: Creates small craters for oil to sit, delivering an even coating for a consistent cook
SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES: Can be used with any hob type to cater for a wide variety of kitchens, including gas cookers, electric hobs and induction
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value. Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T900112 Precision 20cm Non-Stick Forged Aluminium Frying Pan with Black Diamond Coating, Soft Grip Handle, Black Our Precision 20cm frying pan is the perfect tool for cooking up tasty meals with quality results every time Fry up a range of delicious dishes time after time with the Tower Precision 20cm frying pan. It features our Black Diamond stone-reinforced non-stick coating that is 7 times stronger than standard coatings, letting you cook with little to no oil for healthier meals with consistently great results. One 20cm Precision frying pan for cooking up a range of meals Thick forged 3mm aluminium body distributes heat faster for efficient results Ultra-durable Black Diamond stone-reinforced coating free from PFOA and ceramic 7 times stronger than standard non-stick coating, requiring little to no oil for healthier cooking Nano-crate technology creates small craters for oil to sit, delivering an even coating for a more consistent cook Metal utensil safe offers excellent cooking experience Suitable for all hob types including induction Dishwasher safe and oven safe (180 degrees without lids) for versatile use and easy cleaning Black Diamond Coating Stone-reinforced coating is 7 times stronger than standard non-stick coating, requiring little or no oil for healthier cooking Thick Forged Aluminium Each pan has a 3mm aluminium body which provides faster heat distribution for a more efficient cook Nano-Crate Technology Creates small craters for oil to sit, delivering an even coating for a consistent cook
